raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the baseline","name":"What does good work look like for you right now, Carlos?","description":"Surfaces his current definition of quality so feedback can be anchored in his own standard.","purpose":"topic","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recent example","name":"What is one recent piece of your brand work that best shows your current quality bar?","description":"Asks for a concrete artifact that reveals how he is actually applying his standards.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback in practice","name":"What changed in your day-to-day work after the last round of feedback?","description":"Checks whether feedback translated into observable behavior rather than staying abstract.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quality benchmark","name":"Where do you draw the line between solid and excellent in your design work?","description":"Makes his quality bar explicit enough to compare against manager expectations.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Missed signal","name":"Where do you think your work most often misses the mark?","description":"Names the recurring failure mode without softening it into vague self-critique.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Growth blocker","name":"What is the main thing that is slowing your growth right now?","description":"Identifies the bottleneck he experiences so the next development focus can be practical.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback uptake","name":"What kind of feedback turns into action for you fastest?","description":"Surfaces how he best converts input into behavior change.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Practice focus","name":"What one design habit do you want to practice over the next few weeks?","description":"Moves from diagnosis to a near-term development focus he can actually rehearse.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would help you make that practice stick this month?","description":"Gets to the support or constraint that will determine whether the commitment is realistic.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
